1905010.name: Lost Melody
1905010.description:
...Once, we’ve “forgotten” the reason we moved forward,
somewhere, we were “lost”,
from something, we’ve “escaped”,
the sound of a certain song, we’ve “followed”…

Lost Melody is a third person survival horror game, combining the cuteness of the characters and the mystery atmosphere.

Lost Melody is a story of “Levi” a young boy who got lost in a nightmare of “Lucy” , his missing twin sister. The more he continues searching for his sister, more secrets are revealed. Let’s find out what secrets they are hiding from each other.

🌻Features🌻

⦁ Third person survival horror game
⦁ Sunflower fields to run around
⦁ A Teddy Bear, everyone's childhood friend~
⦁ Travel across the world of reality and dreams~
⦁ Make A Wish !
⦁ Treasure Hunt
⦁ Play a piano
⦁ Friends
⦁ Beautiful piano original soundtracks
1905010.supported_languages:
英语*, 泰语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
